description_long: This is a modern, two-story garage structure with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The front facade features large, dark panels and wide windows, with a prominent garage door and a driveway leading up to it. The building is surrounded by a paved area, with a truck parked in front and a few trees providing landscaping. The rear and side facades are lighter in color, with additional windows and a secondary entrance visible. The roof appears to have a terrace or accessible area, possibly for recreational use. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, suitable for contemporary urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, two-story garage with a flat roof, large windows, and a paved driveway, surrounded by minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main garage door, driveway, truck, and entrance with dark facade and landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the lighter exterior, windows, and a tree adjacent to the building.
description_view_2: Rear view with large windows, terrace area on the roof, and a tree in the foreground.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, parked vehicle, and a mix of dark and light facade elements.
